availability_zone_id.description: The unique identifier of the availability zone where the mount target is located.

availability_zone_name.description: The name of the availability zone where the mount target is located.

dns_name.description: The DNS name for the mount target.

file_system_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EFS file system.

file_system_id.description: The ID of the EFS file system for which the mount target is created.

id.description: The ID of the EFS mount target.

ip_address.description: The address at which the file system can be accessed.

mount_target_dns_name.description: The DNS name for the mount target.

mount_target_id.description: The unique identifier of the mount target.

network_interface_id.description: The ID of the network interface that Amazon EFS created when it created the mount target.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the mount target.

security_groups.description: The security groups associated with the mount target.

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet in which the mount target is located.
